title: helianthemum glabrum
intro: Helianthemum glabrum, also known as rockrose or sticky rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the cistus family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Helianthemum glabrum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum glabrum, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
